## ERT1.1. Effective use of reserved or segregated local airspace (PI#9) {#ert1.1.-effective-use-of-reserved-or-segregated-local-airspace-pi9 .Heading-2-ER}

BELGIUM and LUXEMBOURG report a ratio of **66.32%**

- Total number of hours allocated & notified to NM: **1,550**

- Total number of hours used: **1,028**
